Government.The Emperor: Voted in for life by the Senate. Can be of any caste

Core Philosophy: Truth through Omission / Peace through Economic Control

Anatomy.Three dextrous, clawed fingers: Located at the 'wrist' joint of the wing

The Grounded.Role: Physical denser and stronger, serving as heavy infantry, ground-laborers, and marsh-scouts

Architecture.Exterior: Massive cities carved directly into the sheer granite faces of the mountains
Architecture.Interior: Luxurious, airy halls with internal town squares (Atriums) lit by complex mirror arrays

Industry.Micro-Blasting: Explosives so precise they can shear a granite slab like cheese without cracking the surrounding stone
Industry.Cutters: Crows and Jays operate heavy, loud, Dragonstone-powered circular saws to carve fine details

Lifestyle.Lifestyle: Living atop the flat peaks and plateaus in colorful tent-cities, moving North-to-South along the range

Agriculture.High-Altitude Crop Rotation: Planting hardy crops and leaving to harvest a year later

Cloud-Ram.Appearance: Hind legs of a rabbit, hooves of a goat, face of a Red Panda, and curling ram horns
Cloud-Ram.Utility: Farmed for meat, milk, and their shaggy, reddish-patterned wool

Titan-Roach.Appearance: Massive, chitinous beetles the size of ponies
Titan-Roach.Utility: Primary beast of burden, strong, can climb vertical walls, and eat waste/scraps

Night-Carapace.Appearance: Nocturnal, predatory beetle the size of a bobcat

Lith-Weave Moss.Properties: Soft to the touch but hardens on kinetic impact (Non-Newtonian fiber)

The Bank.Origin: The financial arm of **[[The First Wardens]]**
The Bank.Purpose: Using debt to stop wars before they start, ensuring the world remains stable enough to guard the Chaos Dragons

The Secret Funding.Origin: Through complex shell companies, the Bank secretly funds 50% of the **[[Grey Wardens]]** operations

The Divine Bird.Cosmology: The Sky is a massive **Divine Bird**
The Divine Bird.Day/Night: His wings are Blue on the inside (Day) and Black on the outside (Night)
The Divine Bird.The Afterlife: The Moon is the 'Waiting Perch'. The Bird ferries souls from the Moon to the Beyond

Shadow Week.Ritual: Converging South of the **[[Convergence]]**, building city-sized bonfires to 'Singe the Tail Feathers'

The 'Lengthy Affair'.The Defense Strategy: Using flowery, evasive language to avoid triggering the Lie-Reflex (pain/discomfort)
The 'Lengthy Affair'.The Judge's Role: Patiently whittling away the semantic armor until only the raw fact remains

The Order of the Iron-Beak.The Method: Cornering the mind, asking Yes/No questions until the answer is binary

The Proxy Doctrine.Rule: No Avian Captain will ever dock at a Sump-Kin port, nor will they allow a Sump-Kin vessel to tether to a High Roost

Diplomatic Barges.The Top Deck: Manicured park with live orchestras, lush gardens, and exotic meals

Alcohol & Truth.Chemistry: Strong spirits temporarily loosen the synaptic pathways that cause pain when lying
